category_sources: Official Invisible Island bcpp page says bcpp indents C/C++ source programs.
source_facts.description says bcpp is a C(++) beautifier.
display_name_sources: Official Invisible Island page title is `BCPP - C(++) Beautifier`.
docs_sources: Official Invisible Island bcpp page provides synopsis, history, changes, and download links.
source_facts.homepage is the official Invisible Island bcpp page.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official Invisible Island bcpp page provides source downloads/archives but no official source-control repository URL.
tags_sources: Official bcpp page describes indenting C/C++ source programs and replacing tabs/spaces.
